allow: PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\yixuan\\Desktop\\colorwalk; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("$pwd\\public\\logo.png"\); Write-Output "Size: $\($img.Width\)x$\($img.Height\)"; $resize = { param\($size\) $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($size, $size\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.SmoothingMode = 'HighQuality'; $g.InterpolationMode = 'HighQualityBicubic'; $g.DrawImage\($img, 0, 0, $size, $size\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("$pwd\\public\\icon-$size.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "icon-$size.png created" }; & $resize 192; & $resize 512; $img.Dispose\(\))
PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -notmatch "^127\\." } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias, PrefixOrigin)
